description: Fix .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml so that after PRE_ACTION_APPROVED the workflow reads the approved task payload from governance/tasks/<task_id>.json, forms governance/current_task.json, and updates governance/current_task.json through GitHub API inside the workflow.
proof_target: .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml exists in main with a server-side step that updates governance/current_task.json only when decision == PRE_ACTION_APPROVED
